name: AMREP CORP.
summary: AMREP Corporation, organized in 1961 as an Oklahoma corporation, operates through two business segments: land development and homebuilding, primarily in Rio Rancho and Sandoval County, New Mexico. The company sells developed and undeveloped residential lots and commercial/industrial sites, provides landscaping services, and builds single-family detached and attached homes. As of April 30, 2025, it owned approximately 16,600 acres in Sandoval County and employed 49 people.

products.name: Developed Residential Lots
products.description: Entitled residential lots with substantially complete infrastructure sold to homebuilders in New Mexico.

products.name: Commercial/Industrial Land
products.description: Developed and undeveloped sites for commercial and industrial use in Sandoval County, New Mexico.

products.name: Single-Family Homes
products.description: Built-to-order and speculative single-family detached and attached homes in New Mexico.

products.name: Landscaping Services
products.description: Landscaping services provided primarily to homebuilders in the Rio Rancho area.

products.name: Impact Fee Credits
products.description: Credits, allowances and offsets applicable to impact fees sold to homebuilders.
